name: @convariance/client
description: The convariance browser SDK: feed transcript segments in, get typed AI contributions out as events. Sentence-level forwarding with a tail-idle backstop, SSE drain with poll fallback, idempotent delivery, mode-aware read receipts, and launch-URL pairing helpers.

scripts.prepack: pnpm run clean && pnpm run build
scripts.prepublishOnly: node -e "if (!/pnpm/.test(process.env.npm_config_user_agent || '')) throw new Error('publish with pnpm (pnpm publish:all) — npm publish does not apply publishConfig.exports or rewrite workspace:^ deps')"
